title: Diego's Super Silly Sandwich Day
synopsis: Diego wants to make the world's silliest sandwich for the school lunch contest, but everything goes wonderfully wrong in the most hilarious ways possible.

pages.text: Diego had a big idea. A REALLY big idea. "I will make the silliest sandwich ever!" he said. His mom smiled. "For what?" she asked. "For the school lunch contest tomorrow!" Diego jumped up and down.

illustration.description: Diego, a cheerful Latino boy with curly dark hair and big brown eyes, jumping excitedly in a bright yellow kitchen. His mom, a warm woman with long black hair, stands by the counter smiling. Sunlight streams through windows with colorful curtains.
illustration.alt: Diego jumping excitedly in the kitchen while his mom smiles

pages.text: "What makes a sandwich silly?" Mom asked. Diego thought hard. "Lots of colors! Funny shapes! And... and... BANANA SLICES!" Mom laughed. "Bananas on a sandwich? That IS silly!"

illustration.description: Diego with his finger on his chin, thinking with wide eyes and a concentrated expression. Above his head is a thought bubble showing a colorful, wacky sandwich with banana slices. The kitchen background is warm with orange and red tones.
illustration.alt: Diego thinking about his silly sandwich idea with a thought bubble

pages.text: Diego made a list. "Peanut butter, jelly, bananas, pickles, and... cheese!" His little sister Maya peeked over. "Pickles AND bananas?" she giggled. "That sounds super silly, Diego!"

illustration.description: Diego writing on colorful paper with a big purple crayon, tongue sticking out in concentration. His younger sister Maya, a little girl with pigtails and a pink dress, peeks over his shoulder with a big grin. They're at a wooden table with scattered crayons.
illustration.alt: Diego writing his sandwich ingredients list while Maya watches

pages.text: At the store, Diego grabbed a cart. "First, bread!" He reached for the highest shelf. WHOOPS! All the bread fell down! "Sorry!" Diego said to Mr. Kim, the store worker. Mr. Kim just smiled. "No problem, young chef!"

illustration.description: Diego standing in a grocery store aisle with loaves of bread scattered around his feet, looking surprised with wide eyes and hands up. Mr. Kim, a kind Asian man in a store apron, chuckles nearby. The aisle is bright with colorful product displays.
illustration.alt: Diego surrounded by fallen bread loaves in the grocery store

pages.text: Next, bananas! Diego picked the yellowest ones. Then he saw purple bananas! "Mom! Look! Purple bananas!" But they were eggplants. Mom giggled. "Those are vegetables, Diego." "Even better! Purple sandwich vegetables!"

illustration.description: Diego holding up a shiny purple eggplant with amazement, his eyes huge with wonder. His mom stands behind him laughing, hand over her mouth. The produce section is vibrant with green, yellow, purple, and red fruits and vegetables all around them.
illustration.alt: Diego holding up an eggplant thinking it's a purple banana

pages.text: At home, Diego spread everything on the counter. Bread, peanut butter, grape jelly, bananas, pickles, cheese, and the purple eggplant. "This will be the SILLIEST sandwich ever!" he announced.

illustration.description: A kitchen counter covered with sandwich ingredients laid out in a colorful array. Diego stands proudly behind it with his arms spread wide and a huge grin. The ingredients are bright and varied, creating a rainbow of colors across the wooden counter.
illustration.alt: Diego proudly displaying all his sandwich ingredients on the counter

pages.text: Diego started building. First, peanut butter. SPLAT! It went on his nose instead of the bread. Maya laughed. "Your nose is not bread, silly!" Diego looked in the mirror. "But it looks tasty!"

illustration.description: Diego looking at himself in a small mirror with a big glob of peanut butter on his nose, giggling. Maya is in the background doubled over with laughter. The kitchen has warm lighting and peanut butter smeared on the counter.
illustration.alt: Diego with peanut butter on his nose looking in a mirror

pages.text: Next, jelly! Diego squeezed the bottle. Purple jelly squirted everywhere! On the walls! On his shirt! On Maya's head! "I'm a jelly monster!" Maya roared. They both started laughing.

illustration.description: Both children covered in purple grape jelly, laughing hysterically. Maya has jelly in her pigtails and is making monster claws with her hands. Diego is wiping jelly off his cheek, grinning. The kitchen looks like a purple jelly explosion with splatters on the walls.
illustration.alt: Diego and Maya covered in purple jelly, laughing together

pages.text: Finally, Diego added everything else. Bananas, pickles, cheese, and tiny pieces of eggplant. The sandwich was HUGE! And very, very silly looking. "Perfect!" he said.

illustration.description: An enormous, towering sandwich with layers of colorful ingredients spilling out the sides. Diego stands next to it with his arms crossed, looking very proud. The sandwich is comically tall, almost reaching Diego's head, with yellow bananas, green pickles, and purple eggplant visible.
illustration.alt: Diego standing proudly next to his enormous, colorful silly sandwich

pages.text: At school, everyone stared at Diego's sandwich. His friend Aisha said, "Wow! That's... really something!" His friend Marcus pointed. "Are those pickles AND bananas?" Diego nodded proudly. "And purple eggplant!"

illustration.description: Diego in a bright school cafeteria holding his enormous sandwich, surrounded by diverse children with wide eyes and amazed expressions. Aisha, a girl with natural curly hair, and Marcus, a boy with freckles, point at the sandwich. Other kids in the background look curious and amused.
illustration.alt: Diego showing his silly sandwich to amazed classmates in the cafeteria

pages.text: Mrs. Johnson, the teacher, looked at all the sandwiches. There were heart shapes, star shapes, and regular shapes. Then she saw Diego's sandwich. Her eyes got very wide. "My goodness!" she said.

illustration.description: Mrs. Johnson, a friendly teacher with glasses and curly red hair, looking at Diego's sandwich with surprise and delight. On the table are other neat, pretty sandwiches cut into hearts and stars, but Diego's towers above them all, messy and colorful and wonderful.
illustration.alt: Mrs. Johnson examining Diego's sandwich among other neat sandwiches

pages.text: "The silliest sandwich contest winner is..." Mrs. Johnson paused. Everyone held their breath. "Diego! For the most creative and definitely silliest sandwich ever!" Everyone cheered. Diego jumped up and down again.

illustration.description: Diego jumping for joy with his arms in the air, holding a bright blue ribbon. All the diverse children around him are clapping and cheering with big smiles. Mrs. Johnson claps too, and colorful confetti seems to fill the air around Diego as he celebrates his victory.
illustration.alt: Diego celebrating his contest win with classmates cheering around him

pages.text: "Now you have to eat it!" Marcus said. Diego looked at his huge, silly sandwich. He took a tiny bite. "Hmm," he said. Everyone waited. "It tastes... interesting!"

illustration.description: Diego taking a small, cautious bite of his enormous sandwich, his eyes crossed as he concentrates on the taste. His friends watch with anticipation, some covering their mouths trying not to laugh. The sandwich still towers impressively on the cafeteria table.
illustration.alt: Diego taking his first bite of the silly sandwich while friends watch

pages.text: Diego shared pieces with his friends. Aisha tried the banana and peanut butter part. "Not bad!" Marcus ate the pickle and cheese. "Actually good!" Everyone laughed and tried different pieces.

illustration.description: All the children sitting around the cafeteria table sharing pieces of Diego's deconstructed sandwich, all with different expressions of surprise and delight. Some are laughing, others look pleasantly surprised. The mood is joyful and friendly with warm cafeteria lighting.
illustration.alt: Friends sharing and enjoying pieces of Diego's silly sandwich together

pages.text: "The best part wasn't winning," Diego told Maya later. "It was sharing with my friends!" Maya smiled. "And making a big mess?" Diego grinned. "That too!" They both laughed and hugged.

illustration.description: Diego and Maya at home, sitting on a cozy couch and hugging. Diego still has his blue ribbon pinned to his shirt. Through the window behind them, the sun is setting with warm orange and pink colors. Both children have content, happy expressions on their faces.
illustration.alt: Diego and Maya hugging on the couch at home, both smiling happily

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What contest was Diego entering at school?
questions.explanation: Diego wanted to make the silliest sandwich ever for his school's lunch contest.

questions.question: What did Diego think the purple eggplants were?
questions.explanation: Diego thought the purple eggplants were purple bananas and got excited about using them in his sandwich.

questions.question: What happened when Diego tried to put jelly on his sandwich?
questions.explanation: The purple jelly squirted everywhere - on the walls, his shirt, and even on Maya's head!

questions.question: Who won the silly sandwich contest?
questions.explanation: Diego won the contest for making the most creative and definitely silliest sandwich ever.

questions.question: What did Diego say was the best part?
questions.explanation: Diego told Maya that the best part wasn't winning, but sharing his sandwich with his friends.

pages.title: Fill in Diego's Sandwich Recipe!
pages.text: Help Diego remember what went into his silly sandwich! Fill in the missing words.
sentences: First, Diego put _____ butter on the bread.
Then he added _____ jelly that squirted everywhere!
He also used yellow _____ in his silly sandwich.

pages.title: Diego's Friends
pages.text: Complete the sentences about Diego's friends and family!
sentences: Diego's little sister _____ laughed when jelly got in her hair.
His friend _____ said the pickle and cheese part tasted good.
Diego _____ pieces of his sandwich with all his friends.
